CREATE TABLE test_dates (date_string String, parsed_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES ('2021-01-04+23:00:00', parseDateTime('2021-01-04+23:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s'));
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES ('2023-02-28+15:30:00', parseDateTime('2023-02-28+15:30:00', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s'));
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES ('2023-11-01+00:00:00', parseDateTime('2023-11-01+00:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s'));
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES ('Invalid String', parseDateTime('Invalid String', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s'));
SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE date_string <> 'Invalid String' ORDER BY parsed_date DESC;
CREATE TABLE additional_dates (date_string String, parsed_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (parsed_date);
INSERT INTO additional_dates VALUES ('2021-12-31+23:59:59', parseDateTime('2021-12-31+23:59:59', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s'));
INSERT INTO additional_dates VALUES ('2021-01-01+00:00:00', parseDateTime('2021-01-01+00:00:00', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date > '2021-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_dates GROUP BY parsed_date;
SELECT max(parsed_date) FROM test_dates;
SELECT date_string, parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date = (SELECT max(parsed_date) FROM test_dates);
SELECT parseDateTime(date_string, '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s') AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE date_string LIKE '2023%';
CREATE TABLE join_dates (date_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date_string;
INSERT INTO join_dates VALUES ('2023-03-15+12:00:00');
SELECT a.date_string, a.parsed_date FROM test_dates AS a JOIN join_dates AS b ON a.date_string = b.date_string;
SELECT parseDateTime(date_string, '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s') FROM (SELECT date_string FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT parseDateTime('2023-05-15+08:45:00', '%Y-%m-%d+%H:%i:%s') + INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS new_time;
